input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.3.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: the vehicle must have a brake over travel switch (bots).  brake pedal travel exceeding the

            CONTENT:
            rule T.3.3.1: The vehicle must have a Brake Over Travel Switch (BOTS).  Brake pedal travel exceeding the
T.3.3.1 The vehicle must have a Brake Over Travel Switch (BOTS).  Brake pedal travel exceeding the 
normal range will actuate the switch

final_answer: The vehicle must have a Brake Over Travel Switch (BOTS). Brake pedal travel exceeding the normal range will actuate the switch.
